test-method.name: p01_allFieldsValid
test-method.description: P-01 | All 6 fields filled with valid data — no error message visible

test-method.name: p02_fullNameAlphaSpace
test-method.description: P-02 | Full Name accepts alphabets with spaces (first + last name)

test-method.name: p03_phoneValidTenDigit
test-method.description: P-03 | Phone field accepts 10-digit Indian mobile number

test-method.name: p04_serviceAllOptionsSelectable
test-method.description: P-04 | All 7 service options can be selected from dropdown

exception.message: The following asserts failed: P04-1: Exception selecting service 'Social Media Management': element not interactable (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.75) Build info: version: test-method.name: p05_companyNameAlphanumeric
test-method.description: P-05 | Company Name accepts alphanumeric characters and spaces

test-method.name: p06_emailValidFormats
test-method.description: P-06 | Company Email accepts standard .com, .in, +tag formats

test-method.name: p07_queryMultilineText
test-method.description: P-07 | Your Query textarea accepts multi-line and long text

test-method.name: p08_countryCodeDefault
test-method.description: P-08 | Phone country code shows India (+91) as default

test-method.name: p09_fieldsRetainValues
test-method.description: P-09 | Values entered in fields are not cleared on tab / focus change

test-method.name: p10_tabKeyNavigation
test-method.description: P-10 | Tab key moves focus across all 6 form fields in sequence

test-method.name: n01_allFieldsEmpty
test-method.description: N-01 | All 6 fields blank — submit triggers validation error message

test-method.name: n02_fullNameBlank
test-method.description: N-02 | Full Name left blank, all others filled — validation fires

test-method.name: n03_phoneBlank
test-method.description: N-03 | Phone left blank, all others filled — validation fires

test-method.name: n04_serviceNotSelected
test-method.description: N-04 | Service dropdown left at placeholder — validation fires

test-method.name: n05_companyNameBlank
test-method.description: N-05 | Company Name left blank — validation fires

test-method.name: n06_emailBlank
test-method.description: N-06 | Company Email left blank — validation fires

test-method.name: n07_queryBlank
test-method.description: N-07 | Your Query left blank — validation fires

test-method.name: n08_emailNoAtSymbol
test-method.description: N-08 | Company Email without '@' — email format validation error

test-method.name: n09_emailNoDomain
test-method.description: N-09 | Company Email with @ but no domain (e.g. rahul@) — rejected

test-method.name: n10_emailWithSpaces
test-method.description: N-10 | Company Email with embedded space — rejected as invalid

test-method.name: n11_phoneWithLetters
test-method.description: N-11 | Phone field with alphabetic input — rejected or stripped

test-method.name: n12_phoneTooShort
test-method.description: N-12 | Phone with only 3 digits — validation error expected

test-method.name: n13_phoneTooLong
test-method.description: N-13 | Phone with 15 digits — truncated by maxlength or error shown

test-method.name: n14_nameSpacesOnly
test-method.description: N-14 | Full Name filled with only spaces — treated as empty or error

test-method.name: n15_nameNumbersOnly
test-method.description: N-15 | Full Name with numbers only — logs acceptance or rejection

test-method.name: n16_sqlInjectionInName
test-method.description: N-16 | SQL injection attempt in Full Name — no crash or DB error

test-method.name: n17_xssInQuery
test-method.description: N-17 | XSS script tag in Query — not executed, no JS alert appears

exception.message: The following asserts failed: N17-1: XSS alert was triggered — script executed! This is a SECURITY VULNERABILITY.

test-method.name: n18_fullName300Chars
test-method.description: N-18 | Full Name 300 characters — page does not crash

test-method.name: n19_query1000Chars
test-method.description: N-19 | Your Query with 1000 characters — page does not crash

test-method.name: n20_onlyServiceFilledRestBlank
test-method.description: N-20 | Only service dropdown filled, all others blank — validation fires
